Exclusive to:
Shrines are craftable Structures located in the Prototypers & Stations Filter, Structures Filter and Special Event Filter. Different types of Shrine are available with different events and opens up the opportunity for you to craft items from the new event

Contents

  • 1 Gobbler Shrine
  • 2 Varg Shrine
  • 3 Pig Shrine
  • 4 Carrat Shrine
  • 5 Beefalo Shrine
  • 6 Catcoon Shrine
  • 7 Bunnyman Shrine
  • 8 Dragonfly Shrine
  • 9 Depths Worm Shrine
  • 10 Clockwork Knight Shrine

Gobbler Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Gobbler

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Gobbler Shrine is a craftable Structure located in the Prototypers & Stations Filter, Structures Filter and Special Event Filter, and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping. Offering any type of Berry Bush or a Juicy Berry Bush to the Gobbler Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.

Gobbler Shrines attract nearby Gobblers to them and renders them passive to the player, meaning that they won't run away when approached. Gobblers will also not eat berries off of bushes while near a Gobbler Shrine. Gobblers, however, will still eat Berries lying on the ground.

If the Gobbler Shrine is destroyed by Hammering it, it will drop any Berry Bush planted in it, along with its resources. Gobbler Shrines are also flammable.

Varg Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Varg

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Varg Shrine is a craftable Structure located in the Prototypers & Stations Filter, Structures Filter and Special Event Filter and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping. Offering a Torch to the Varg Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.

While a Torch is in the Shrine, its fuel usage rate is multiplied by 0.2 - so a Torch with 100% durability, which would usually last for 75 seconds, will last for 375 seconds (6.25 minutes) instead. Once the Torch runs out, the Varg Shrine will no longer be active.

Pig Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Pig King

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Pig Shrine is a craftable Structure located in the Prototypers & Stations Filter, Structures Filter and Special Event Filter, and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping. Offering a Meat or Jerky to the Pig Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.

Carrat Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Carrat

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Carrat Shrine is a craftable Structure located in the Prototypers & Stations Filter, Structures Filter and Special Event Filter, and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Carrot or Seeds to the Carrat Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.

Beefalo Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Beefalo

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Beefalo Shrine is a crafted Structure located in the Prototypers & Stations Filter, Structures Filter and Special Event Filter, and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Beefalo Wool to the Beefalo Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.

Catcoon Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Catcoon

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Catcoon Shrine is a crafted Structure located in the Structures Filter, and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Feather (including Down Feathers and Malbatross Feathers) to the Catcoon Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets. Once a single feather has been added, the Offerings Filter is opened permanently and will never need to be replenished unless the Shrine is destroyed.

Bunnyman Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Bunnyman Shrine is a crafted Structure and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Carrot to the Bunnyman Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets. Once a single carrot has been added, the Offerings Filter is opened until the carrot spoils or the Shrine is destroyed.

Dragonfly Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Dragonfly Shrine is a crafted Structure and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Charcoal to the Dragonfly Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets. Once a single Charcoal has been added, the Offerings Filter is opened until the Shrine is destroyed.

Depths Worm Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Depths Worm

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Depths Worm Shrine is a crafted Structure and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Monster Meat to the Depths Worm Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets. Once a single Monster Meat has been added, the Offerings Filter is opened until the Shrine is destroyed.

Clockwork Knight Shrine

Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight

UnofferedOfferedBurnt

The Clockwork Knight Shrine is a crafted Structure and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.

Offering a Gear, Electrical Doodad, or Frazzled Wires to the Clockwork Knight Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.

After offering, a Mocking Bird will appear and give the Playbill "My Knights Four and I" if the player comes near. If the player runs away, the Mocking Bird will also run away. The Mocking Bird can drop "My Knights Four and I" only once, but the player can come near the shrine at any time to get the Playbill.

Quotes

Mocking Birds quotes:

Arrives to land on the shrine

  • "Here we go!"
  • "Were you all just waiting for me?"
  • "Hiya, chump!"

  • "Do something already!"
  • "What now?"
  • "Whatdya got?"

When you trade something from the shrine

  • "There's a sucker born every minute!"
  • "Hope it was worth it!"

Drops the play bill for the player

  • "Here's my bill!"

Flys away from the shrine.

  • "Boring!"

Flys away from the shrine to catch a play.

  • "That's my cue!"

Shrine is ignited and heckler flys away.

  • "Bunch of ashes!"

Shrine is getting hammered and heckler flys away

  • "Was it something I said? HA HA HA HA!"

The Clockwork Knight Shrine is a crafted Structure and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 2 Boards to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping.
Offering a Gear, Electrical Doodad, or Frazzled Wires to the Clockwork Knight Shrine will grant players access to the Offerings Filter where they are able to acquire event-specific items using Lucky Gold Nuggets.
After offering, a Mocking Bird will appear and give the Playbill "My Knights Four and I" if the player comes near. If the player runs away, the Mocking Bird will also run away. The Mocking Bird can drop "My Knights Four and I" only once, but the player can come near the shrine at any time to get the Playbill.

The '''Gobbler Shrine''' is a craftable [[Structure]] located in the [[Prototypers & Stations Filter]], [[Structures Filter]] and [[Special Event Filter]], and requires 4 [[Gold Nugget]]s and 2 [[Boards]] to craft. It is always available to craft and does not require prototyping. Offering any type of [[Berry Bush]] or a [[Juicy Berry Bush]] to the Gobbler Shrine will grant players access to the [[Offerings Filter]] where they are able to acquire event-specific items using [[Lucky Gold Nugget]]s.

Gobbler Shrines attract nearby [[Gobbler]]s to them and renders them passive to the player, meaning that they won't run away when approached. Gobblers will also not eat berries off of bushes while near a Gobbler Shrine. Gobblers, however, will still eat [[Berries]] lying on the ground.

If the Gobbler Shrine is destroyed by [[Hammer]]ing it, it will drop any Berry Bush planted in it, along with its resources. Gobbler Shrines are also flammable.

Offering a [[Torch]] to the Varg Shrine will grant players access to the [[Offerings Filter]] where they are able to acquire event-specific items using [[Lucky Gold Nugget]]s.
